metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.sends.total
metrics.description: outcome: sent / opted_out / cost_capped / country_blocked / kill_switched.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.cost_micro_units.total
metrics.description: Cost aggregation — the SIGNAL for billing + cost-cap enforcement.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.cost_per_message.gauge
metrics.description: Latest per-message cost — anomaly detection when carriers raise pricing.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.segments.histogram
metrics.description: Distribution of message segments (160 chars = 1). Multi-segment = higher cost.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.opt_outs.gauge
metrics.description: Active SmsOptOut count by reason. Sampled hourly.

metrics.name: stackra.notifications.sms.stop_keywords.total
metrics.description: Inbound STOP messages processed. Anomalously high = deliverability + reputation issue.
